messages.content: You can send the picture directly in this chat. Please attach the image, and I'll assist you further!
Not giving me an option to do so

I apologize for the inconvenience. If you're unable to send a picture here, you can describe the issue in detail, and I'll do my best to assist you. Alternatively, you can email the picture to cs@rambobikes.com, and our team will help you from there.
Which is the Savage 2.0 that was $2799.99 and now $2199.99?

The Savage 2.0 is currently priced at $2,199.99, down from its previous price of $2,799.99. This model is Rambo's all-time #1 seller, known for its versatility and performance. If you have any more questions or need assistance with ordering, feel free to ask!
That was the price for the 20aH , not 15aH

The Savage 2.0 with the 20Ah battery was originally priced at $2,799.99 and is now available for $2,199.99. The 15Ah version remains at its standard pricing. If you need further details or assistance with ordering, let me know!
Are there taxes or shipping costs?

Yes, there are additional costs to consider. Shipping charges apply to all orders, and taxes may vary based on your location. The exact amount will be calculated at checkout. If you have any more questions or need assistance with your order, feel free to ask!
I thought that there was free shipping and no taxes if shipped to 112 Saddle Ridge Drive, Dallas. PA

Shipping charges typically apply to all orders, and taxes may vary based on your location. However, if there are specific promotions or policies for your area, I recommend checking directly at checkout or contacting our customer service for confirmation. If you have any other questions or need assistance, feel free to ask!
You can reach Rambo Bikes customer service at (952) 283-0777. We're here to help!
